question: Transform this red car into a futuristic brushed stainless steel finish—it should have that reflective, silvery metallic look of polished industrial steel.
Replace the red wine in the glass with iced cola, making sure to include realistic bubbles and ice cubes.
Transform this stone castle to look like it's entirely constructed from LEGO bricks, with an authentic plastic toy-like quality and visible brick studs.
Add an intricate William Morris-style botanical pattern to the dress in deep navy and ivory, ensuring the pattern flows naturally along every fold and crease of the fabric.

Only modify the front-left girl with short black hair: transform her hair into a silver-blue gradient (darker charcoal gray at the roots fading to silver-blue at the tips) with realistic individual strand textures, not a flat block of color. Add subtle glitter eyeshadow with fine shimmer particles primarily on her upper eyelids, and enhance her lashes to be more prominent. Do not alter the makeup, hair color, or skin tone of the other three friends. Keep the background crowd, confetti, and stage lighting colors exactly as they are.
Can you elongate and slim down my legs a bit, and make my ankles thinner too? The Doc Martens make my calves look really bulky

Change the model's gold sequin gown to a deep emerald green sequin effect, keeping the sparkle points and highlight directions as consistent as possible with the original (avoid turning it into a flat green blob). Change the shoes from glossy black patent leather to an ivory white satin texture (with softer, more diffuse reflections). Leave everything else unchanged.

Only modify the figure itself: change the hair material from that glossy plastic look to a more premium matte resin finish (it should still retain subtle soft highlights, but without the plastic-like shine). Also make the eyes look like glass eyes—more translucent with distinct highlight points and a sense of depth. Do not alter anything else on the desk or the lamp lighting.

Change the phone's back panel from glossy black glass to a brushed titanium finish with a natural, slightly gray titanium color. The brushed texture must have clear directional striations (not random noise-like grain). Reflections should be softer and more diffused compared to glass, but preserve the phone's edge contours and camera module exactly as they are. Do not alter the marble countertop.

Transform the egg yolks into a more jammy, freshly-sliced runny state with a gooey, flowing center, but keep the eggs' position, shape, and the rising steam completely unchanged. Also make the nori sheets appear crispier with more pronounced surface texture and visible micro-pores, but don't shift the color to an unnatural vivid green. Leave all other toppings and the broth's oil highlights untouched.

Change the sofa upholstery from velvet to linen with a natural woven texture (keeping the original teal color unchanged), preserve the existing wrinkles and seat cushion indentations exactly as they are, and ensure the window's cast light and shadows adapt naturally to the new material. Additionally, give only the two solid-colored pillows on the right a 'texture upgrade': add a subtle herringbone weave pattern, but do not change their colors or positions. Leave the dog, rug, and bookshelf untouched.

I want to give this more of a 'fashion influencer' aesthetic: swap the glossy patent leather jacket for a charcoal gray wool overcoat (matte finish with subtle nubby wool grain texture) keeping the same length and silhouette—preserve the zipper placement and collar structure so it doesn't look like a completely different garment. Then do light skin retouching: fade the visible acne marks but leave pores and natural skin texture intact; change the lip color to a warm coral shade. Leave the smudges on the mirror and the elevator background completely untouched.

Change the shoe upper from breathable mesh to short-nap suede (the kind with a directional pile that shows brush strokes), but keep all stitching lines, perforation positions, and the embossed brand logo text exactly intact and sharp. Change the laces from fluorescent green to a slightly yellowed off-white. Don't alter anything else, especially not the blurred track background.
Can you change the bar countertop to white marble with gray veining? It should have a polished, glossy finish
Apply a subtle 'no-makeup makeup' look to the bare-faced woman on the far left, with a dusty mauve lip color and very understated natural eye makeup

Give him a complete outfit change—replace the top with a black tailored blazer over a crisp white dress shirt, swap the jeans for charcoal wool trousers, and change the footwear to cognac leather penny loafers
Change the bride's white wedding gown to a traditional Indian bridal lehenga in deep crimson red with heavy gold zari embroidery and intricate beadwork
Change the second white SUV from the left to matte olive drab green, like a military off-road vehicle
Give me a full Hollywood glam look! I want a rich bronze smoky eye with blended gradient, sharp winged cat-eye liner, dramatic voluminous false lashes, and a bold true-red velvet matte lip
Replace all the gray slate roofs with ornate gilded copper roofing like those on grand European palaces, make it more majestic

Retouch this headshot for me - clean up the eyebrows so they look neater, cover the dark circles and acne scars, even out the skin tone but don't airbrush it so much that I look like a mannequin, and add just a subtle touch of natural healthy color
Transform the central figure's costume to Gothic Lolita style with a black lace dress featuring white ruffle trim, and add a mini top hat fascinator accessory on her head
Change the hair of the girl with long straight hair on the far right of the second row to ash blonde short hair.
Replace all the double-decker buses on the left side of the lane with taxis.
Replace the red-and-white gingham tablecloth with a rich hunter green velvet fabric, maintaining a festive Christmas aesthetic but with a more elegant, upscale look
Change the fabric texture of the trainer's compression shirt to an embossed snakeskin pattern while keeping the color unchanged
Replace all the strawberries in the image with cherries.
Slightly increase the gap between the two people—the woman no longer needs to be leaning on the man. Have them both sit upright independently while keeping everything else unchanged
Change all the red brick walls of the Victorian terraced houses to that smooth board-formed concrete texture, you know, the Tadao Ando style

Change the man reading the book so he's looking up toward the ceiling instead, with the book tucked away into his trench coat pocket, one hand gripping the handrail pole in a cool confident standing pose
Replace the upper garments of the two men currently playing chess with traditional Tang-style jackets featuring front-opening closures and knotted buttons—one in dark navy, the other in grayish brown
Change the shooting red team player's pose to performing a crossover dribble — that signature low center-of-gravity, side-to-side hesitation move used to shake past defenders
Change all brown corrugated cardboard boxes on the conveyor belt to semi-transparent frosted acrylic material, allowing the silhouettes of items inside to be faintly visible
Change the robe color of the foremost Tibetan woman from red to sapphire blue, and replace her waist apron (bangdian) with a striped pattern interweaving purple, green, and red
Change the overall uniform color for the five players on the left side of the stage from blue-and-white to black-and-gold, and replace the logo with a flaming skull emblem.
